September.suggestion: Content volume below average — plan 1–2 extra posts this month.

tiers.Gold: Top performer — study this post's formula and replicate it.
tiers.Silver: Solid. Small SEO or promotion improvements could push it to Gold.
tiers.Bronze: Needs work. Improve SEO scores or expand thin content.
tiers.Needs Work: Underperformer. Prioritise SEO fixes or reconsider the topic angle.

reading_time.too_short: Under 2 min feels thin — add practical tips, examples, or an FAQ.
reading_time.ideal: 2–4 min is the engagement sweet spot for this site.
reading_time.too_long: Over 4 min for a news post may reduce completion rate — consider splitting into a series.

poor.tip: Focus keyword barely present — use it in the title, H2s, and opening paragraph.

fair.tip: Keyword usage is partial — strengthen meta description and add internal links.

good.tip: Good keyword integration. Check image alt text and URL slug.

strong.tip: Excellent SEO authority. Focus energy on promotion and distribution.

poor.tip: Content quality low — improve readability, structure, and keyword density.

fair.tip: Decent content. Add subheadings, bullet points, or a clear CTA.

good.tip: Strong content. Minor polish on transitions and CTAs will lift it further.

strong.tip: Maximum content score — this is the benchmark to write to.
